templates.subject: School notice next steps
templates.body_template:
Hello {sender},

I reviewed the notice and understand the next steps are:
{actions}

I will handle these before {due_date}. Please let me know if any additional form or confirmation is required.

Thank you.

templates.subject: Invoice review and payment checklist
templates.body_template:
Hello {sender},

I am reviewing the invoice and will verify the amount, due date, and payment instructions before taking action. Current next steps:
{actions}

If anything is missing or incorrect, please send clarification before {due_date}.

Thank you.

templates.subject: Utility bill action checklist
templates.body_template:
Hello {sender},

I reviewed the utility notice and understand there may be service or payment consequences. My next steps are:
{actions}

I will confirm the balance and deadline before taking payment action. Please confirm available assistance or payment arrangement options if applicable.

Thank you.

templates.subject: Appointment confirmation checklist
templates.body_template:
Hello {sender},

I reviewed the appointment notice. My next steps are:
{actions}

Please confirm whether any documents, fees, or arrival instructions are required before {due_date}.

Thank you.

templates.subject: Intake follow-up checklist
templates.body_template:
Hello {sender},

I reviewed the intake instructions and noted these next steps:
{actions}

Please confirm whether copies or originals are required and whether there is a safer way to submit sensitive documents.

Thank you.

templates.subject: Document next-step checklist
templates.body_template:
Hello {sender},

I reviewed the document and identified these next steps:
{actions}

I will confirm details against the source document before taking action.

Thank you.
